name: Winslow's Inc Which Will Do Bs
districts_or_customers: unknown; address is a Las Vegas mailbox suite (W Azure Dr #140-212)
recent_news: No public news or web presence found. CCSD (Clark County School District) runs in-house transportation, limiting third-party contractor demand. Mailbox/PO Box style address suggests not a fleet yard.
fit_notes: No evidence of substantive school bus operation; mailbox address and tiny employee count argue against tuck-in viability. Skip.

name: Van Go Taxi
districts_or_customers: Dane, Jefferson, Columbia and surrounding counties; dialysis/medical appointments, hospital discharges, special-needs riders, airport
recent_news: Per 2016 Hometown News (hngnews.com) article, owner John Vanderbloemen announced Van Go would discontinue traditional taxi service and refocus exclusively on non-emergency medical / special-needs transportation. Company has operated since 2006 in Waunakee, WI.
website: vangotaxi.com (domain currently parked/for-sale per latest fetch; previously active)
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus operator — focus is NEMT/wheelchair-accessible van service for medical appointments and special-needs riders. Out of scope for Summit's K-12 yellow-bus tuck-in strategy; only potentially relevant if Summit is acquiring SPED/alt-transport van fleets in WI.
